extraction.one_line_summary: BISSEGGER Stefan won the Stage 1 time trial on his local training roads despite struggling in TT preparation just two weeks prior.
tactical_patterns: BISSEGGER's form peaked rapidly in final two weeks after struggling early in TT-specific training block, suggesting late-peaking protocol.
Local course knowledge proved decisive as BISSEGGER executed pre-planned strategy perfectly on daily training roads near home.

rider_signals.BISSEGGER Stefan: positive: extreme form progression within 14-day window from struggling in TT training to winning, indicates successful taper protocol
